coins.notes: Multiple varieties: No Motto (1838-1866), With Motto (1866-1891). Branch mints: O, S, CC.
coins.obverse_description: Liberty seated on rock, holding shield with 'LIBERTY' and pole with liberty cap, 13 stars around, date below
coins.reverse_description: Eagle with shield on breast, 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA', 'QUAR. DOL.' below
